evals.name: first-install-no-existing-profile
evals.prompt: Set up the rev-ops plugin. I don't have any other C4CS plugins installed.
evals.expected_output: Skill checks for existing profile, reports it not found, directs user to install another C4CS plugin first OR proceeds with minimal session-only setup. Collects connector status. Does NOT ask company-level questions that belong to company-profile.md.

assertions.text: Output checks for existing company-profile.md before asking any questions
Output reports company profile as absent and explains the implication (either directs to another plugin or offers minimal setup)
Output includes a connector detection step reporting status of HubSpot, Google Drive, Slack, Linear, Zapier, and CS platform
Output does NOT ask for company_name, primary_segment, current_arr, fiscal_year_start_month, crm_system, or cs_platform (these come from company-profile.md)

evals.name: returning-install-existing-profile
evals.context: company-profile.md exists with: company_name=Acme Corp, primary_segment=Enterprise, current_arr=12000000, fiscal_year_start_month=2, crm_system=HubSpot, cs_platform=Gainsight. No rev-ops/CLAUDE.md exists yet.
evals.expected_output: Skill reads existing profile silently, confirms inherited fields, then asks only RevOps-specific Groups A-F. Does not re-ask inherited fields. After collecting all required fields, writes CLAUDE.md and produces a readiness summary.

assertions.text: Output confirms it found the existing company profile and names at least one inherited field
Output does NOT ask for company_name, primary_segment, current_arr, crm_system, or cs_platform
Output asks for target_growth_pct, nrr_current, sales_motion, touch_model, ae_quota, arr_per_csm (Group A — all required)
Output asks for current_ae_count and current_csm_count (Group B — required headcount)
Output asks for discount_standard_threshold_pct and discount_elevated_threshold_pct (Group C — required)
Output asks for mql_definition, sal_definition, sql_definition (Group D — required)
After collecting required fields, output produces a capability readiness summary showing which skills are at full capability vs. degraded

evals.name: update-mode-existing-revops-profile
evals.prompt: Re-run the rev-ops setup — I just completed annual planning and the baseline has changed.
evals.context: Both company-profile.md and rev-ops/CLAUDE.md exist with full configuration.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects existing rev-ops profile, offers update mode vs. full re-run, defaults to update mode, asks which fields need changing rather than re-collecting everything.

assertions.text: Output detects existing rev-ops/CLAUDE.md and explicitly offers update mode vs. full re-run
Output does NOT immediately start asking all configuration questions from scratch
Update mode offers a focused, efficient path — asks which specific fields changed rather than a full interview
assertions.rubric: PASS: Output explicitly asks 'which fields need updating' or equivalent, presents a list of field groups, and offers to update specific ones. FAIL: Output launches into full Group A-F interview sequence without first scoping what changed.

evals.name: ocv-catalog-absent-readiness-signal
evals.context: company-profile.md exists. User answers all Groups A-F but when asked about OCV catalog (Group E) responds: 'We don't have one yet.'
evals.expected_output: Skill completes setup, writes CLAUDE.md with ocv_catalog_path omitted, and produces a readiness summary that flags SA5 skills as degraded with [Confidence: Low] and explains how to resolve with outcome-statement-builder.

assertions.text: Readiness summary shows SA5 skills (deal-to-outcome-tracing, outcome-to-value-tracking, sales-cs-handoff-quality-scoring) as degraded or partial
Readiness summary references outcome-statement-builder as the resolution path for the OCV gap
Setup completes successfully despite absent OCV — skill does not block or error on missing optional field
